tuning: E A D G B E
content:
A mashup by JZR R MNL

Capo on 1st fret


Verse:
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]Am/G[/ch]           [ch]Am/F[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
Hello             is it me you are looking for[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dm[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
I can see it in your eyes[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]
I can see it in your smile[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bb[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
You are all I ever wanted[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]Am/G[/ch]   [ch]Am/F[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
And my arms are open wide[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Dm[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
I should know just know what to say[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]
And you should know just what to do[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]
And I want to tell you so much [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]
I love you [/tab]


Chorus:
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]
Hello from the other side, I must've called a thousand times to tell you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
I'm sorry, for everything that I've done, but when I call you never seem to be home.[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]
Hello from the outside, at least I can say that I've tried to tell you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]Em[/ch]
I'm sorry, for breaking your heart, but it don't matter, [/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch] | [ch]Am[/ch] | [ch]C[/ch] | [ch]F[/ch] 
it clearly doesn't tear you apart anymore.[/tab]


Pre-chorus:
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]Am/G[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
I've been alone with you inside my mind [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]Am/G[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
And in my dreams I've kissed your lips a thousand times [/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]Am/G[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
I sometimes I see you pass outside my door [/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
There's such a difference between us[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
and a million miles.[/tab]


Chorus:
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]
Hello from the other side, I must've called a thousand times to tell you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
I'm sorry, for everything that I've done, but when I call you never seem to be home.[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]
Hello from the outside, at least I can say that I've tried to tell you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]Em[/ch]
I'm sorry, for breaking your heart, but it don't matter, [/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch] | [ch]Am[/ch] | [ch]C[/ch] | [ch]F[/ch] 
it clearly doesn't tear you apart anymore.[/tab]


Pre-Chorus:
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]Am/G[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
I long to see the sunlight in your hair [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]Am/G[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
And tell you time and time again how much I care [/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]Am/G[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
Sometimes I feel my heart will overflow[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Am/G[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
Hello, I've just got to let you know [/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
It's no secret that the both of us [/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
are running out of time.[/tab]
